<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate">
<meta http-equiv="Pragma" content="no-cache">
<meta http-equiv="Expires" content="0">
<title>Paladear - Mercado de Sabores</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,500;9..144,600;9..144,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{--azul:#4d7d8a;--azul-dark:#3a6370;--azul-light:#d4e5ea;--azul-mid:#6e9aa6;--bg:#ebeef1;--fg:#1a3740;--card:#fff;--border:#dde3e8;--muted:#e5e8ec;--muted-fg:#444;--destructive:#e8633a;--whatsapp:#25d366}
html,body{overflow-x:hidden;max-width:100%}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg);min-height:100vh;font-size:16px}

/* ── SPINNER DE CARGA ── */
#loadingOverlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:9999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:20px;transition:opacity .4s ease}
#loadingOverlay.hidden{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.spinner{width:64px;height:64px;border:5px solid var(--azul-light);border-top-color:var(--azul);border-radius:50%;animation:spin 1s linear infinite}
.loading-text{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:17px;color:var(--azul-dark);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif}
button{cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:inherit}

/* ── HEADER ── */
.header{background:var(--azul);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:300;box-shadow:0 3px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.header-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 20px;gap:14px}
@media(max-width:767px){.header-inner{padding:8px 10px;gap:8px}}
.logo-wrap{flex-shrink:0}
.logo{width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:contain;background:#fff;padding:3px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
@media(max-width:767px){.logo{width:72px;height:72px}}
.social-btns{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0}
.social-btn{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
@media(max-width:767px){.social-btn{width:38px;height:38px}.social-btn svg{width:18px;height:18px}.social-btns{gap:5px}}
.social-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.32);transform:scale(1.08)}
.social-btn svg{width:22px;height:22px;fill:#fff}
.badges{display:none;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;flex:1}
@media(min-width:900px){.badges{display:flex}}
.badge{font-size:13px;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:999px;font-weight:700}
.badge-w{background:#fff;color:var(--azul-dark)}
.badge-t{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);font-weight:500}
/* Botón flotante del carrito */
#cart-fab{position:fixed;bottom:94px;right:24px;z-index:1000;width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border:none;font-size:26px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 22px rgba(58,99,112,.55);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0;font-family:inherit}
#cart-fab:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}
@media(max-width:767px){body.builder-open #cart-fab,body.builder-open #chat-fab{display:none!important}}
#cart-fab .cart-count{position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;background:var(--destructive);color:#fff;border-radius:50%;min-width:22px;height:22px;font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;padding:0 5px;border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
@media(max-width:767px){#cart-fab{bottom:88px;right:18px;width:52px;height:52px;font-size:24px}#chat-fab{right:18px}}
.cart-count{background:var(--destructive);color:#fff;border-radius:50%;width:24px;height:24px;font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700}
.banner{background:var(--azul-dark);text-align:center;padding:8px 16px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,.92)}
.banner b{color:#fff}

/* ── BUSCADOR ── */
.search-wrap{position:relative;margin-bottom:22px}
.search-input{width:100%;background:var(--card);border:2.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:32px;padding:14px 52px 14px 22px;font-size:17px;color:var(--fg);outline:none;transition:border .2s;font-family:inherit}
.search-input:focus{border-color:var(--azul)}
.search-icon{position:absolute;right:18px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);pointer-events:none;color:var(--muted-fg);font-size:22px}

/* ── CARRUSEL (mobile) / GRILLA (desktop) ── */
.carousel-section{margin-bottom:28px}
.carousel-title{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark);margin-bottom:14px;font-family:"Playfair Display",serif}
.carousel-wrap{position:relative}
.carousel-track{display:flex;gap:12px;overflow-x:auto;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;scrollbar-width:none;padding:0 4px 10px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
.carousel-track::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.carousel-card{flex-shrink:0;width:160px;background:var(--card);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.08);border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;scroll-snap-align:start}
.carousel-card:hover{border-color:var(--azul-mid);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.13)}
.carousel-card-img{width:100%;height:150px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:44px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.carousel-card-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:10px}
.carousel-card-body{padding:10px 12px}
.carousel-card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--fg);line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:4px}
.carousel-card-cat{font-size:11px;color:var(--azul-mid);font-weight:600}
.carousel-card-price{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:var(--fg);margin-top:4px}
/* Desktop: grilla fija de 4, sin scroll */
@media(min-width:768px){
  .carousel-wrap{overflow:visible}
  .carousel-track{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;overflow:visible;padding:0}
  .carousel-card{width:auto;max-width:none}
}

/* ── MOBILE: chips horizontales de categorías ── */
.cats-mobile-grid{display:flex;gap:8px;margin:0 -20px 20px;padding:4px 20px 10px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scroll-snap-type:x proximity}
.cats-mobile-grid::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
@media(min-width:768px){.cats-mobile-grid{display:none}}
.cat-mobile-btn{flex-shrink:0;border-radius:999px;padding:10px 18px;text-align:center;border:2.5px solid transparent;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.18);transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;scroll-snap-align:start}
.cat-mobile-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.12);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.22)}
.cat-mobile-btn.active{border-color:#fff!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,.5),0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.25)!important}
.cat-mobile-btn .nm{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;line-height:1;letter-spacing:.3px;white-space:nowrap}
.mobile-prods-area{display:block}
@media(min-width:768px){.mobile-prods-area{display:none}}

/* ── DESKTOP: sidebar + área productos ── */
.main-layout{display:block}
@media(min-width:768px){
  .main-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px 1fr;gap:28px;align-items:start}
  .cats-sidebar{position:sticky;top:120px;padding-right:4px}
  .cats-sidebar h1{font-size:21px;color:var(--azul-dark);margin-bottom:12px;font-weight:700;font-family:"Playfair Display",serif}
}
.cats-sidebar{display:none}
@media(min-width:768px){.cats-sidebar{display:block}}
.cat-list-btn{width:100%;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;text-align:left;border:2.5px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:6px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}
.cat-list-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateX(3px);box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.cat-list-btn.active{border-color:#fff!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,.4),0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.2)!important}
.cat-list-btn .nm{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.3px}

/* ── PRODUCTOS ── */
.prod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:16px}
@media(min-width:640px){.prod-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
@media(min-width:960px){.prod-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
@media(min-width:1200px){.prod-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}}
.pcard{background:var(--card);border-radius:14px;overflow:visible;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.09);border:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.pcard.highlight-card{border-color:var(--azul);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(77,125,138,.25),0 6px 20px rgba(77,125,138,.35);animation:pulseHighlight 2.2s ease-out}
@keyframes pulseHighlight{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(77,125,138,.55),0 6px 20px rgba(77,125,138,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(77,125,138,0),0 6px 20px rgba(77,125,138,.35)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(77,125,138,.25),0 6px 20px rgba(77,125,138,.35)}}
.pcard:hover{box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.13);border-color:var(--azul-mid)}
.pcard-img{width:100%;height:220px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:52px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:zoom-in;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px 12px 0 0}
.pcard-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:10px}
.pcard-body{padding:14px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.pcard-name{font-weight:700;font-size:15px;line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:4px}
.pcard-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2px}
.pcard-head .pcard-name{flex:1;margin-bottom:0}
.info-btn{background:var(--azul-light);border:none;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;padding:0}
.info-btn:hover{background:var(--azul);transform:scale(1.1)}
.sabor-row{margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.sabor-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--azul-dark);white-space:nowrap}
.sabor-select{flex:1;min-width:120px;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--azul-dark);background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:6px 10px;cursor:pointer;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s}
.sabor-select:hover{border-color:var(--azul-mid)}
.sabor-select:focus{border-color:var(--azul)}
.info-modal{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);z-index:9000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;animation:fadeIn .2s ease}
.info-modal-box{background:var(--card);border-radius:18px;max-width:440px;width:100%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:22px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}
.info-modal-close{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:32px;height:32px;background:var(--muted);border:none;border-radius:50%;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--fg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s}
.info-modal-close:hover{background:var(--azul);color:#fff}
.info-modal-img{width:100%;height:180px;background:#f8fafb;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden}
.info-modal-img img{max-width:100%;max-height:100%;object-fit:contain}
.info-modal-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--azul-dark);margin-bottom:12px;font-weight:700;padding-right:30px}
.info-modal-text{font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--fg)}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.pcard-brand{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted-fg);margin-bottom:8px}

/* ── LISTA DE RESULTADOS DEL BUSCADOR ── */
.search-results{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.search-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;background:var(--card);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06);border:1.5px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer}
.search-item:hover{border-color:var(--azul);box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(77,125,138,.18);transform:translateX(3px)}
.search-item-img{width:60px;height:60px;flex-shrink:0;background:#f8fafb;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:28px;overflow:hidden}
.search-item-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:4px}
.search-item-body{flex:1;min-width:0}
.search-item-name{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--fg);line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:2px}
.search-item-cat{font-size:12px;color:var(--azul-mid);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px}
.search-item-price{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark)}
.search-item-arrow{font-size:26px;color:var(--azul-mid);font-weight:300;flex-shrink:0}
@media(max-width:767px){
  .search-item{padding:8px 12px;gap:10px}
  .search-item-img{width:50px;height:50px;font-size:22px}
  .search-item-name{font-size:13px}
  .search-item-arrow{font-size:22px}
}
.opt-btns{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px}
.chat-quick-faqs{padding:8px 4px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.chat-faq-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark);margin-bottom:2px;opacity:.8}
.chat-faq-btn{background:var(--azul-light);border:1.5px solid var(--azul-mid);border-radius:20px;padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--azul-dark);cursor:pointer;text-align:left;transition:all .2s;font-family:inherit}
.chat-faq-btn:hover{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border-color:var(--azul)}
.opt-btn{border-radius:8px;padding:5px 11px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;transition:all .2s;background:var(--muted);color:var(--azul-dark);border:2px solid transparent}
.opt-btn.active{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border-color:var(--azul)}
.opt-btn:hover:not(.active){border-color:var(--azul-mid)}
.prices{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:end;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px}
.price-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted-fg);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;font-weight:700}
.price-min{font-size:18px;font-weight:800}
.price-may{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;color:#1a4d5e;background:#9eccd8;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:8px}
.qty-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
.qty-btn{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--azul);background:transparent;color:var(--azul);font-size:20px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s}
.qty-btn:hover{background:var(--azul);color:#fff}
.qty-val{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;min-width:28px;text-align:center}
.add-btn{width:100%;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:7px;transition:all .2s;background:var(--azul);color:#fff;margin-top:auto}
.add-btn:hover{background:var(--azul-dark)}
.add-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.card-cart-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;align-items:center}
.card-del-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;background:transparent;border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:rgba(0,0,0,.3);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.card-del-btn:hover{border-color:#e8633a;color:#e8633a;background:#fff5f3}
.card-edit-btn{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--azul-light);border:1.5px solid var(--azul-mid);color:var(--azul-dark);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s}
.card-edit-btn:hover{background:var(--azul);color:#fff}
.add-btn.added{background:#16a34a}
.acum-badge{font-size:12px;color:var(--azul-dark);font-weight:700;background:var(--azul-light);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:6px;border:1px solid rgba(77,125,138,.25);white-space:nowrap}

@media(max-width:767px){#mainContainer{padding:12px 12px}}
@media(max-width:767px){
  /* Grilla: 1 columna en mobile */
  .prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px}

  /* Card: sin overflow visible */
  .pcard{border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden}

  /* Imagen un poco más grande en mobile */
  .pcard-img{height:185px;font-size:44px}

  /* Body levemente más compacto */
  .pcard-body{padding:12px 14px}

  /* Precios en fila normal — hay ancho suficiente */
  .prices{flex-direction:row;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;align-items:flex-end}
  .price-min{font-size:17px}
  .price-may{font-size:14px}
}

/* ── BOTÓN VOLVER ── */
.back-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--azul);color:var(--azul-dark);padding:10px 18px;border-radius:24px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:18px;transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer}
.back-btn:hover{background:var(--azul);color:#fff}

/* ── RESULTADOS BÚSQUEDA MOBILE ── */
#searchResultsMobile{display:none;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:16px}
#searchResultsMobile.active{display:block}
@media(max-width:767px){
  #searchResultsMobile.active{
    position:fixed;
    top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;
    z-index:290;
    background:var(--bg);
    overflow-y:auto;
    padding:12px 12px 100px;
    /* Empuja el contenido debajo del header sticky */
    padding-top:calc(var(--header-h, 80px) + 56px + 12px);
  }
}

/* ── BOTÓN VOLVER ARRIBA ── */
#backToTop{position:fixed;bottom:162px;right:24px;z-index:999;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(77,125,138,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px);color:#fff;border:none;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .35s,transform .2s;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}
#backToTop.visible{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
#backToTop:hover{transform:scale(1.1);background:rgba(77,125,138,.8)}
@media(max-width:767px){#backToTop{bottom:152px;right:18px;width:38px;height:38px;font-size:17px}}

/* ── MINI CART POPUP ── */
.mini-cart-popup{position:fixed;top:100px;right:18px;z-index:600;width:320px;max-width:calc(100vw - 32px);background:var(--card);border-radius:16px;box-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.22);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px;animation:slideDown .25s ease-out}
.mini-cart-popup.hidden{display:none}
@keyframes slideDown{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.mini-cart-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:11px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--azul-dark)}
.mini-cart-item{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:start;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.mini-cart-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.3}
.mini-cart-opt{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted-fg);display:block}
.mini-cart-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.mini-qty-btn{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--azul);background:transparent;color:var(--azul);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer}
.mini-qty-btn:hover{background:var(--azul);color:#fff}
.mini-qty-val{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;min-width:18px;text-align:center}
.mini-cart-price{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}
.mini-cart-del{background:transparent;border:none;color:rgba(0,0,0,.25);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;padding:0 4px;transition:color .2s}
.mini-cart-del:hover{color:var(--destructive)}
.mini-cart-progress{margin-top:9px;font-size:12px;color:var(--azul-dark);font-weight:600;text-align:center}
.mini-cart-progress-bar{height:5px;background:var(--muted);border-radius:5px;margin-top:5px;overflow:hidden}
.mini-cart-progress-fill{height:100%;background:var(--azul);border-radius:5px;transition:width .4s ease}
.mini-go-cart-btn{width:100%;margin-top:10px;background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px}
.mini-go-cart-btn:hover{background:var(--azul-dark)}

/* ── CARRITO PANEL ── */
.cart-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(26,55,64,.5);z-index:500;display:none}
.cart-overlay.open{display:block}
.cart-panel{position:fixed;right:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:420px;max-width:100vw;background:var(--card);z-index:501;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:-4px 0 32px rgba(0,0,0,.22);transition:transform .3s ease-out;transform:translateX(100%)}
.cart-panel.open{transform:translateX(0)}
.cart-header{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;padding:18px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.cart-header h2{font-size:20px;font-weight:700}
.cart-header-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.cart-chat-btn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);color:#fff;width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;font-size:19px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s,transform .2s}
.cart-chat-btn:hover,.cart-chat-btn:active{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);transform:scale(1.08)}
body.cart-open #cart-fab,body.cart-open #chat-fab{display:none!important}
.cart-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px}
.cart-empty{text-align:center;padding:48px 0;color:var(--muted-fg)}
.cart-empty .big{font-size:44px;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:.3}
.cart-item{display:flex;align-items:start;gap:10px;padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.cart-item-name{flex:1;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3}
.cart-item-opt{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-fg);font-weight:400;display:block}
.cart-item-price{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;min-width:78px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap}
.cart-item-del{background:transparent;color:rgba(0,0,0,.25);padding:0 5px;transition:color .2s;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;border:none}
.cart-item-del:hover{color:var(--destructive)}
.cart-footer{padding:16px;border-top:2px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
.may-badge{border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;text-align:center}
.may-active{background:var(--azul);color:#fff}
.may-inactive{background:var(--azul-light);color:var(--azul-dark);border:1px solid rgba(77,125,138,.2)}
.total-rows{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
.total-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px;color:var(--muted-fg)}
.total-row.main{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--fg);border-top:2px solid var(--border);padding-top:8px;margin-top:4px}
.total-row.disc{color:var(--azul-dark);font-weight:700}
.wa-btn{background:var(--whatsapp);color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:15px;font-weight:800;font-size:16px;width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer}
.wa-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.08);transform:scale(1.02)}
.close-btn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;color:#fff;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;font-size:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s;cursor:pointer}
.close-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.35)}

/* ── MODAL MOBILE ── */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:400;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.modal-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(26,55,64,.5);animation:fadeIn .2s}
.modal-content{position:relative;z-index:10;display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-height:90vh;margin-top:auto;width:100%;max-width:1200px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;background:var(--card);border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;box-shadow:0 -4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.2);overflow:hidden;animation:fadeIn .2s}
.modal-header{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;padding:18px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.modal-header h2{font-size:22px;font-weight:700}
.modal-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:18px}

/* ── ZOOM ── */
#imgZoom{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;background:rgba(0,0,0,.88);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:zoom-out;animation:fadeIn .2s}
#imgZoom img{max-width:92vw;max-height:88vh;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5);object-fit:contain}
#imgZoom .zoom-close{position:absolute;top:18px;right:22px;color:#fff;font-size:38px;cursor:pointer;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:none;border-radius:50%;width:48px;height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.hidden{display:none!important}

/* ── CHATBOT ── */
#chat-fab{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:1000;width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border:none;font-size:28px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.28);transition:transform .2s}
#chat-fab:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}
#chat-box{position:fixed;bottom:96px;right:24px;z-index:1000;width:360px;max-width:calc(100vw - 32px);background:var(--card);border-radius:18px;box-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.2);display:none;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;border:1.5px solid var(--border)}
#chat-box.open{display:flex}
#chat-header{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;padding:13px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:15px}
#chat-header img{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;padding:2px;object-fit:contain}
#chat-close{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;color:#fff;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-left:auto}
#chat-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;max-height:360px;min-height:200px}
.cmsg{max-width:88%;padding:9px 14px;border-radius:14px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.5}
.cmsg.bot{background:var(--muted);color:var(--fg);align-self:flex-start;border-bottom-left-radius:4px}
.cmsg.user{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;align-self:flex-end;border-bottom-right-radius:4px}
.cmsg.typing{opacity:.6}
#chat-input-row{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:11px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
#chat-input{flex:1;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:9px 14px;font-size:14px;outline:none;font-family:inherit;resize:none;height:38px;line-height:20px}
#chat-input:focus{border-color:var(--azul)}
#chat-send{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:50%;width:38px;height:38px;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}


/* ── GRANOLA BANNER ── */
.granola-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7a4f1e 0%,#b07030 100%);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;margin-bottom:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(160,100,30,.35);flex-wrap:wrap}
.granola-banner:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(160,100,30,.45)}
@media(max-width:480px){.granola-banner{padding:16px}.granola-banner svg{width:44px;height:44px}.granola-banner-text h3{font-size:17px}.granola-banner-btn{width:100%;text-align:center}}
.granola-banner-text h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px}
.granola-banner-text p{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.4}
.granola-banner-btn{background:#fff;color:#7a4f2a;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:11px 20px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s}
.granola-banner-btn:hover{background:#f5e8d8}
/* ── GRANOLA MODAL ── */
.granola-modal{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:800;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.granola-modal.hidden{display:none}
.granola-modal-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(26,55,64,.55);animation:fadeIn .2s}
.granola-modal-box{position:relative;z-index:10;margin:auto;width:100%;max-width:820px;max-height:92vh;background:var(--card);border-radius:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;animation:fadeIn .22s;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
@media(max-width:767px){.granola-modal-box{margin-top:auto;border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;max-height:95vh}}
.granola-modal-header{background:#b07030;color:#fff;padding:16px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.granola-modal-header h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700}
.granola-modal-close{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;color:#fff;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.granola-modal-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.35)}
.granola-modal-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 22px}
/* cat tabs scroll hint mobile */
.mix-cat-tabs-wrap{position:relative}
.mix-cat-tabs-wrap::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:32px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--card));pointer-events:none;border-radius:0 8px 0 0}
/* granola reuses mix inner styles but with amber accents */
.granola-cat-tab{flex-shrink:0;padding:9px 14px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;border:none;border-bottom:2.5px solid transparent;color:var(--muted-fg);background:none;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600;transition:all .2s}
.granola-cat-tab.active{color:#7a4f1e;border-bottom-color:#b07030}
.granola-sum-head{background:#fdefd8;padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#7a4f1e}
.granola-size-btn{flex:1;min-width:90px;padding:12px 10px;border-radius:12px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;text-align:center;transition:all .2s;color:var(--muted-fg)}
.granola-size-btn:hover{border-color:#b07030;color:#7a4f1e}
.granola-size-btn.sel{border-color:#b07030;background:#fdefd8;color:#7a4f1e}
.granola-size-btn strong{display:block;font-size:17px;font-weight:800;color:inherit}
.granola-size-btn span{font-size:12px;opacity:.8}
.granola-add-btn{width:100%;margin-top:10px;background:#b07030;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:13px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s}
.granola-add-btn:hover{background:#7a4f1e}
.granola-add-btn:disabled{background:var(--muted);color:var(--muted-fg);cursor:not-allowed}


/* ── BANNERS CAROUSEL ── */
.banners-track-wrap{margin-bottom:24px;overflow:hidden}
/* Desktop: side by side */
@media(min-width:600px){
  .banners-track{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}
  .banners-dots{display:none}
}
/* Mobile: carousel */
@media(max-width:599px){
  .banners-track{display:flex;transition:transform .4s ease;will-change:transform;align-items:stretch}
  .banner-slide{flex:0 0 100%;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .banner-slide .mix-banner,.banner-slide .granola-banner{flex:1;min-height:100px;align-items:center}
  .banners-dots{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:10px}
}
.bdot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s}
.bdot.active{background:var(--azul)}
/* Granola banner colors */
.granola-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7a4f2a 0%,#b87040 100%);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(120,80,40,.35);flex-wrap:wrap}
.granola-banner:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(120,80,40,.45)}
.granola-banner-text h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px}
.granola-banner-text p{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.4}
.granola-banner-btn{background:#fff;color:#7a4f2a;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:11px 20px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s}
.granola-banner-btn:hover{background:#f5e8d8}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .mix-banner svg,.granola-banner svg{width:44px;height:44px}
  .mix-banner-text h3,.granola-banner-text h3{font-size:17px}
  .mix-banner-btn,.granola-banner-btn{width:100%;text-align:center}
}
/* ── GRANOLA MODAL ── */
.granola-modal{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:800;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.granola-modal.hidden{display:none}
.granola-modal-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(26,55,64,.55);animation:fadeIn .2s}
.granola-modal-box{position:relative;z-index:10;margin:auto;width:100%;max-width:860px;max-height:92vh;background:var(--card);border-radius:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;animation:fadeIn .22s;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
@media(max-width:767px){.granola-modal-box{margin-top:auto;border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;max-height:95vh}}
.granola-modal-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7a4f2a,#b87040);color:#fff;padding:16px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.granola-modal-header h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700}
.granola-modal-close{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;color:#fff;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.granola-modal-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.35)}
.granola-modal-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 22px}
/* ── GRANOLA CAT TABS con scroll y hint ── */
.ing-quicknav{background:var(--azul-light);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:13px}
.ing-quicknav-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark);margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px}
.ing-qn-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(77,125,138,.15)}
.ing-qn-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ing-qn-name{flex:1;font-weight:600;color:var(--fg);font-size:13px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.ing-qn-g{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-fg);white-space:nowrap;margin-right:4px}
.ing-qn-btn{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.ing-qn-btn:hover{background:var(--azul-dark)}
.granola-ing-qn-btn{background:#b87040;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.granola-ing-qn-btn:hover{background:#7a4f2a}
.granola-cats-wrap{position:relative;margin-bottom:16px}
.granola-cat-tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;padding-bottom:4px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
.granola-cat-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.granola-cat-tab{flex-shrink:0;padding:8px 16px;border-radius:999px;border:none;background:var(--tab-color,#b87040);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .2s;opacity:.7}
.granola-cat-tab.active{opacity:1;box-shadow:0 0 0 2.5px #fff,0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.granola-cat-tab:hover:not(.active){opacity:.9}
.granola-scroll-hint{position:absolute;right:0;top:0;bottom:4px;width:40px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--card));pointer-events:none;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0}
/* granola prod list same as mix */
.granola-prod-panel{background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:14px}
.granola-prod-list{max-height:260px;overflow-y:auto}
.granola-prod-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.granola-prod-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.granola-prod-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--fg)}
.granola-prod-price{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-fg);margin-right:6px;white-space:nowrap}
.granola-prod-input{width:72px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;color:#7a4f2a;text-align:center;outline:none;background:var(--card)}
.granola-prod-input:focus{border-color:#b87040}
.granola-prod-input.over{border-color:#e8633a;color:#e8633a}
/* granola summary */
.granola-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 240px;gap:16px}
@media(max-width:600px){.granola-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.granola-sum-panel{border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;align-self:start;position:sticky;top:0}
.granola-sum-head{background:#f5e8d8;padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#7a4f2a}
.granola-fill-wrap{padding:12px 14px 10px}
.granola-fill-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700}
.granola-fill-bar{height:10px;background:var(--muted);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden}
.granola-fill-fill{height:100%;border-radius:6px;transition:width .3s,background .3s}
.granola-fill-hint{font-size:12px;text-align:center;margin-top:5px;font-weight:600}
.granola-ing-list{padding:0 14px 10px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto}
.granola-ing-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.granola-ing-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.granola-ing-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--fg);flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;margin-right:6px}
.granola-ing-detail{color:var(--muted-fg);white-space:nowrap}
.granola-sum-footer{padding:12px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.granola-add-btn{width:100%;margin-top:10px;background:#b87040;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:13px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s}
.granola-add-btn:hover{background:#7a4f2a}
.granola-add-btn:disabled{background:var(--muted);color:var(--muted-fg);cursor:not-allowed}


/* ── MAYORISTA CONFETTI ── */
.may-toast{position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(0);z-index:9999;background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:28px 20px 24px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.3);transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),opacity .3s;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;width:300px;max-width:90vw}
.may-toast.show{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1);opacity:1}
.may-toast.hide{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.85);opacity:0}

.may-cone{width:54px;height:54px;flex-shrink:0;overflow:visible;position:relative;z-index:1}
.may-cone svg{overflow:visible;width:54px;height:54px}
.may-toast-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark);line-height:1.2;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;flex:1;padding:0 4px;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:2}
.may-toast-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px}
.may-cone-left{margin-left:-8px}
.may-cone-right{margin-right:-8px}
.may-cone-left svg{transform:rotate(-28deg);transform-origin:center bottom}
.may-cone-right svg{transform:rotate(28deg);transform-origin:center bottom}
@keyframes shakeL{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-28deg)}30%{transform:rotate(-42deg)}60%{transform:rotate(-20deg)}80%{transform:rotate(-32deg)}}
@keyframes shakeR{0%,100%{transform:rotate(28deg)}30%{transform:rotate(36deg)}60%{transform:rotate(22deg)}80%{transform:rotate(30deg)}}
.may-cone-left.shake svg{animation:shakeL .7s ease-out}
.may-cone-right.shake svg{animation:shakeR .7s ease-out}

/* ── MIX BANNER ── */
.mix-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--azul-dark) 0%,var(--azul) 100%);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 20px;margin-bottom:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(77,125,138,.35);flex-wrap:wrap}
@media(max-width:480px){.mix-banner{padding:16px}.mix-banner svg{width:44px;height:44px}.mix-banner-text h3{font-size:17px}.mix-banner-btn{width:100%;text-align:center}}
.mix-banner:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(77,125,138,.45)}
.mix-banner-text h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px}
.mix-banner-text p{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.4}
.mix-banner-btn{background:#fff;color:var(--azul-dark);border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:11px 20px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s}
.mix-banner-btn:hover{background:var(--azul-light)}
/* ── MIX MODAL ── */
.mix-modal{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:800;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.mix-modal.hidden{display:none}
.mix-modal-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(26,55,64,.55);animation:fadeIn .2s}
.mix-modal-box{position:relative;z-index:10;margin:auto;width:100%;max-width:820px;max-height:92vh;background:var(--card);border-radius:18px 18px 18px 18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;animation:fadeIn .22s;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
@media(max-width:767px){.mix-modal-box{margin-top:auto;border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;max-height:95vh}}
.mix-modal-header{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;padding:16px 22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.mix-modal-header h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700}
.mix-modal-close{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;color:#fff;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;flex-shrink:0}
.mix-modal-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.35)}
.mix-modal-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px 22px}
/* ── MIX INTERIOR ── */
.mix-sizes{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.mix-size-btn{flex:1;min-width:90px;padding:12px 10px;border-radius:12px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;text-align:center;transition:all .2s;color:var(--muted-fg)}
.mix-size-btn:hover{border-color:var(--azul-mid);color:var(--azul-dark)}
.mix-size-btn.sel{border-color:var(--azul);background:var(--azul-light);color:var(--azul-dark)}
.mix-size-btn strong{display:block;font-size:17px;font-weight:800;color:inherit}
.mix-size-btn span{font-size:12px;opacity:.8}
.mix-step-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:10px}
.mix-step-label.step-active{font-size:14px;color:#fff;background:var(--azul);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;animation:pulseStep 1.5s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulseStep{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(77,125,138,.5)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(77,125,138,0)}}
.mix-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 240px;gap:16px}
@media(max-width:600px){.mix-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.mix-prod-panel{background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden}
.mix-cat-tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;padding:10px 14px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
.mix-cat-tab{flex-shrink:0;padding:9px 16px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;border:none;border-radius:999px;color:#fff;background:var(--tab-color,var(--azul));font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600;transition:all .2s;opacity:.7}
.mix-cat-tab.active{opacity:1;box-shadow:0 0 0 2.5px #fff,0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.mix-prod-list{max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto}
.mix-prod-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.mix-prod-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.mix-prod-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--fg)}
.mix-prod-price{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-fg);margin-right:6px;white-space:nowrap}
.mix-prod-input{width:72px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;color:var(--azul-dark);text-align:center;outline:none;background:var(--card)}
.mix-prod-input:focus{border-color:var(--azul)}
.mix-prod-input.over{border-color:#e8633a;color:#e8633a}
.mix-sum-panel{border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;align-self:start;position:sticky;top:0}
.mix-sum-head{background:var(--azul-light);padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--azul-dark)}
.mix-fill-wrap{padding:12px 14px 10px}
.mix-fill-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700}
.mix-fill-bar{height:10px;background:var(--muted);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden}
.mix-fill-fill{height:100%;border-radius:6px;transition:width .3s,background .3s}
.mix-fill-hint{font-size:12px;text-align:center;margin-top:5px;font-weight:600}
.mix-ing-list{padding:0 14px 10px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto}
.mix-ing-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.mix-ing-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.mix-ing-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--fg);flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;margin-right:6px}
.mix-ing-detail{color:var(--muted-fg);white-space:nowrap}
.mix-sum-footer{padding:12px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.mix-total-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:10px}
.mix-total-row span:first-child{color:var(--muted-fg)}
.mix-total-row.main{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--fg);border-top:2px solid var(--border);padding-top:8px;margin-bottom:0}
.mix-total-row.main span:first-child{color:var(--fg)}
.mix-add-btn{width:100%;margin-top:10px;background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:13px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s}
.mix-add-btn:hover{background:var(--azul-dark)}

/* ── CATEGORY COLOR PALETTE (paleta agua-teal del logo) ── */
:root{
  --cat0:#4d7d8a;--cat1:#3a6370;--cat2:#6e9aa6;--cat3:#5a8f9e;
}

/* ── FLY-TO-CART ANIMATION ── */
.fly-img{position:fixed;z-index:9999;pointer-events:none;border-radius:50%;width:60px;height:60px;object-fit:contain;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--azul-light);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.25);animation:flyToCart .65s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) forwards}
@keyframes flyToCart{0%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}60%{opacity:.9;transform:scale(.7)}100%{opacity:0;transform:scale(.25)}}

/* ── LISTA MAYORISTA ── */
.mayorista-section{display:none;padding:18px 0}
.mayorista-section.active{display:block}
.mayorista-badge{background:#1a3740;color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 18px;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;border:2px solid #4d7d8a;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.mayorista-badge .may-warn{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#ffd700;letter-spacing:.3px}
.mayorista-badge .may-info{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85)}
.mayorista-banner-promo{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--azul-dark),var(--azul));color:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:18px 20px;margin-bottom:20px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(58,99,112,.35);transition:all .2s}
.mayorista-banner-promo:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,99,112,.45)}
.mayorista-banner-promo .may-promo-icon{font-size:32px;flex-shrink:0}
.mayorista-banner-promo .may-promo-text h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.mayorista-banner-promo .may-promo-text p{font-size:13px;opacity:.9}
.may-nav-btn{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 18px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .2s;font-family:inherit;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.may-nav-btn:hover{background:var(--azul-dark);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.may-tab{cursor:pointer;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;transition:all .2s;border:2.5px solid transparent;background:var(--muted);color:var(--fg)}
.may-tab.active{background:var(--azul);color:#fff;border-color:var(--azul)}
.may-tab:hover:not(.active){border-color:var(--azul-mid)}
.may-tabs-wrap{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.may-cart-warn{background:#fff3cd;border:2px solid #ffc107;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;color:#856404;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;display:none}
.may-cart-warn.visible{display:block}
.bulto-badge{display:inline-block;background:var(--azul-light);color:var(--azul-dark);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px}
.may-pcard .pcard-name-may{font-weight:700;font-size:15px;line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:4px}
.may-qty-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<div id="loadingOverlay">
  <div class="spinner"></div>
  <div class="loading-text">Cargando Paladear...</div>
</div>

<header class="header">
<div class="header-inner">
  <div class="logo-wrap">
    <img class="logo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt="Paladear">
  </div>
  <div class="social-btns">
    <a class="social-btn" href="https://wa.me/5492616512823" target="_blank" title="WhatsApp">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/><path d="M12 2C6.477 2 2 6.477 2 12c0 1.89.525 3.66 1.438 5.168L2.006 22l4.984-1.307A9.961 9.961 0 0012 22c5.523 0 10-4.477 10-10S17.523 2 12 2zm0 18.25a8.24 8.24 0 01-4.258-1.178l-.306-.181-3.157.828.844-3.07-.2-.319A8.25 8.25 0 1112 20.25z"/></svg>
    </a>
    <a class="social-btn" href="https://www.instagram.com/palade.ar?igsh=ZTJweDNkMDhsY3Vj" target="_blank" title="Instagram">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zM12 0C8.741 0 8.333.014 7.053.072 2.695.272.273 2.69.073 7.052.014 8.333 0 8.741 0 12c0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.333 23.986 8.741 24 12 24c3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98C15.668.014 15.259 0 12 0zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 100 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 000-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 110-8 4 4 0 010 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 100 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 000-2.881z"/></svg>
    </a>
    <a class="social-btn" href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/5TtZMgtvq5XfycqG8" target="_blank" title="Cómo llegar">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C8.13 2 5 5.13 5 9c0 5.25 7 13 7 13s7-7.75 7-13c0-3.87-3.13-7-7-7zm0 9.5a2.5 2.5 0 010-5 2.5 2.5 0 010 5z"/></svg>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="badges">
    <span class="badge badge-w">5% off en efectivo</span>
    <span class="badge badge-t">📍 Pueyrredón 588 · Mza</span>
    <span class="badge badge-t">Lun–Sáb 10 a 20 hs</span>
    <span class="badge badge-t">🚚 Envío gratis +$40.000</span>
    <span class="badge badge-t">📞 261 651 2823</span>
  </div>
</div>
</header>
<div class="banner">🏷️ <b>Hasta 20% de descuento</b> superando los <b>$80.000</b> en tu compra minorista — precios en azul son precios con descuento</div>

<div style="max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:10px 20px 0">
  <div class="may-tabs-wrap" id="mainTabs">
    <button class="may-tab active" id="tabMinorista" onclick="switchTab('minorista')">🛒 Lista Minorista</button>
    <button class="may-tab" id="tabMayorista" onclick="switchTab('mayorista')">📦 Lista Mayorista</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div style="max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:18px 20px" id="mainContainer">
  <div class="search-wrap">
    <input class="search-input" type="text" placeholder="Buscar productos..." oninput="onSearch(this.value)" id="searchInput">
    <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
  </div>
  <!-- Resultados de búsqueda en mobile: aparecen justo bajo el buscador -->
  <div id="searchResultsMobile" class="hidden"></div>


<!-- ── BANNERS CARRUSEL ── -->
<div class="banners-track-wrap" id="bannersTrackWrap">
  <div class="banners-track" id="bannersTrack">

    <!-- Banner 1: Mix -->
    <div class="banner-slide">
      <div class="mix-banner" onclick="openMix()">
        <svg id="mixIconSvg" width="64" height="64" viewBox="0 0 40 40" style="flex-shrink:0" role="img" aria-label="Ícono mix">
          <g id="mi1" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="15" cy="6" rx="4" ry="3.5" fill="#e8c488"/><path d="M15,3 Q17,4.5 15,9" fill="none" stroke="#c49850" stroke-width="0.9"/></g>
          <g id="mi2" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="23" cy="6" rx="2.8" ry="3.8" fill="#eedfc4" transform="rotate(-15,23,6)"/></g>
          <g id="mi3" style="opacity:0"><circle cx="19" cy="5" r="2" fill="#e07860"/></g>
          <path id="mixBag" d="M10,16 Q7,16 7,21 L9,35 Q9,37 11,37 L29,37 Q31,37 31,35 L33,21 Q33,16 30,16 Z" fill="#7bbf8e"/>
          <path d="M16,16 Q16,10 20,10 Q24,10 24,16" fill="none" stroke="#7bbf8e" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          <g id="mi_in1" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="16" cy="26" rx="4.5" ry="4" fill="#e8c488"/><path d="M16,22.5 Q18.5,24 16,30" fill="none" stroke="#c49850" stroke-width="1"/></g>
          <g id="mi_in2" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="24" cy="28" rx="3" ry="4.2" fill="#eedfc4" transform="rotate(-15,24,28)"/></g>
          <g id="mi_in3" style="opacity:0"><circle cx="19" cy="32" r="2.2" fill="#e07860"/></g>
        </svg>
        <div class="mix-banner-text" style="flex:1">
          <h3>Armá tu mix personalizado</h3>
          <p>Frutos secos, semillas y deshidratados en el bolsón que quieras</p>
        </div>
        <button class="mix-banner-btn" onclick="openMix()">Armar mix →</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Banner 2: Granola -->
    <div class="banner-slide">
      <div class="granola-banner" onclick="openGranola()">
        <svg id="granolaIconSvg" width="64" height="64" viewBox="0 0 40 40" style="flex-shrink:0" role="img" aria-label="Ícono granola">
          <g id="gr1" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="13" cy="5" rx="3.5" ry="2.5" fill="#f5d9a0"/></g>
          <g id="gr2" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="21" cy="4" rx="2" ry="3" fill="#d4956a" transform="rotate(10,21,4)"/></g>
          <g id="gr3" style="opacity:0"><circle cx="28" cy="6" r="2.2" fill="#e8b86a"/></g>
          <!-- bowl -->
          <path id="granolaBowl" d="M6,18 Q6,34 20,34 Q34,34 34,18 Z" fill="#c8855a"/>
          <ellipse cx="20" cy="18" rx="14" ry="4" fill="#b87040"/>
          <!-- contents inside -->
          <g id="gr_in1" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="14" cy="24" rx="3.5" ry="2.5" fill="#f5d9a0"/></g>
          <g id="gr_in2" style="opacity:0"><ellipse cx="21" cy="23" rx="2" ry="3" fill="#d4956a" transform="rotate(10,21,23)"/></g>
          <g id="gr_in3" style="opacity:0"><circle cx="27" cy="25" r="2.2" fill="#e8b86a"/></g>
        </svg>
        <div class="granola-banner-text" style="flex:1">
          <h3>Creá tu propia granola</h3>
          <p>Combiná cereales, semillas, frutas y más a tu gusto</p>
        </div>
        <button class="granola-banner-btn" onclick="openGranola()">Crear granola →</button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
  <!-- dots solo mobile -->
  <div class="banners-dots" id="bannersDots">
    <span class="bdot active" onclick="goSlide(0)"></span>
    <span class="bdot" onclick="goSlide(1)"></span>
  </div>
</div>

  <!-- Banner promo Lista Mayorista -->
  <div class="mayorista-banner-promo" onclick="switchTab('mayorista')">
    <div class="may-promo-icon">📦</div>
    <div class="may-promo-text">
      <h3>¿Comprás en grandes volúmenes?</h3>
      <p>Accedé a nuestra <strong>Lista Mayorista</strong> con precios especiales — Compra mínima $250.000</p>
    </div>
    <button class="may-nav-btn">Ver →</button>
  </div>
  <!-- MÓVIL: grilla de categorías -->
  <div class="cats-mobile-grid" id="catsMobileGrid"></div>
  <!-- MÓVIL: productos -->
  <div class="mobile-prods-area hidden" id="mobileProdsArea"></div>

  <!-- DESKTOP: sidebar + área -->
  <div class="main-layout">
    <div class="cats-sidebar">
      <h1>Categorías</h1>
      <div id="catsSidebarList"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="desktopProdsArea">
      <!-- Carruseles de inicio - se rellena con JS -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── SECCIÓN LISTA MAYORISTA ── -->
<div style="max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px 30px" id="mayoristaSection" class="mayorista-section">
  <!-- Avisos de condiciones -->
  <div class="mayorista-badge">
    <div class="may-warn">⚠️ Compra mínima: $250.000</div>
    <div class="may-warn">📦 Venta únicamente por bulto cerrado</div>
    <div class="may-info">Seleccioná los productos y el sistema validará automáticamente que cumplas con los requisitos de compra mayorista.</div>
  </div>
  <!-- Buscador mayorista -->
  <div class="search-wrap" style="margin-bottom:18px">
    <input class="search-input" type="text" placeholder="Buscar en Lista Mayorista..." oninput="onSearchMay(this.value)" id="searchInputMay">
    <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
  </div>
  <div id="maySearchResults" class="hidden"></div>
  <!-- Categorías y productos mayorista -->
  <div class="main-layout">
    <div class="cats-sidebar">
      <h1>Categorías</h1>
      <div id="mayCatsSidebarList"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="mayDesktopProdsArea"></div>
  </div>
  <!-- Mobile categorías mayorista -->
  <div class="cats-mobile-grid" id="mayCatsMobileGrid"></div>
  <div class="mobile-prods-area hidden" id="mayMobileProdsArea"></div>
  <!-- Repetir aviso cerca del carrito -->
  <div class="mayorista-badge" style="margin-top:24px">
    <div class="may-warn">⚠️ Compra mínima: $250.000</div>
    <div class="may-warn">📦 Venta únicamente por bulto cerrado</div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px">
    <button class="wa-btn" onclick="pedirWAMayorista()" style="background:#25d366;max-width:380px">💬 Pedir por WhatsApp Mayorista</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-overlay hidden" id="catModal">
  <div class="modal-bg" onclick="closeModal()"></div>
  <div class="modal-content">
    <div class="modal-header"><h2 id="modalTitle"></h2><button class="close-btn" onclick="closeModal()">×</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="modalBody"></div>
  </div>
</div>



<!-- ── MIX MODAL ── -->
<div class="mix-modal hidden" id="mixModal">
  <div class="mix-modal-bg" onclick="closeMix()"></div>
  <div class="mix-modal-box">
    <div class="mix-modal-header">
      <h2>🥜 Armá tu mix personalizado</h2>
      <button class="mix-modal-close" onclick="closeMix()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="mix-modal-body">
      <div class="mix-step-label">1. Elegí el tamaño del bolsón</div>
      <div class="mix-sizes" id="mixSizes"></div>
      <div id="mixBuilderArea" style="display:none">
        <div class="mix-step-label step-active" style="margin-top:12px">👆 Paso 2 — Seleccioná los ingredientes de la lista</div>
        <div id="mixQuickNav" style="display:none;background:var(--azul-light);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:13px"></div>
        <div class="mix-layout">
          <div class="mix-prod-panel">
            <div class="mix-cat-tabs-wrap">
              <div class="mix-cat-tabs" id="mixCatTabs"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="mix-prod-list" id="mixProdList"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="mix-sum-panel">
            <div class="mix-sum-head" id="mixSumHead">Tu bolsón</div>
            <div class="mix-fill-wrap">
              <div class="mix-fill-label">
                <span>Llenado</span>
                <span id="mixFillLbl">0 g</span>
              </div>
              <div class="mix-fill-bar"><div class="mix-fill-fill" id="mixFillFill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
              <div class="mix-fill-hint" id="mixFillHint">Agregar a tu carrito</div>
            </div>
            <div class="mix-ing-list" id="mixIngList"></div>
            <div class="mix-sum-footer">
              <div class="mix-total-row"><span>Ingredientes</span><span id="mixIngCount">0</span></div>
              <div class="mix-total-row main"><span>Total</span><span id="mixTotal">$0</span></div>
              <button class="mix-add-btn" id="mixAddBtn" disabled onclick="mixAgregarAlCarrito()">Agregar a tu carrito</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── GRANOLA MODAL ── -->
<div class="granola-modal hidden" id="granolaModal">
  <div class="granola-modal-bg" onclick="closeGranola()"></div>
  <div class="granola-modal-box">
    <div class="granola-modal-header">
      <h2>🥣 Creá tu propia granola</h2>
      <button class="granola-modal-close" onclick="closeGranola()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="granola-modal-body">
      <div class="mix-step-label">1. Elegí el tamaño del bolsón</div>
      <div class="mix-sizes" id="granolaSizes"></div>
      <div id="granolaBuilderArea" style="display:none">
        <div class="mix-step-label step-active" style="margin-top:12px">👆 Paso 2 — Seleccioná los ingredientes de la lista</div>
        <div id="granolaQuickNav" style="display:none;background:#fdefd8;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:13px"></div>
        <div class="mix-layout">
          <div class="mix-prod-panel">
            <div class="mix-cat-tabs-wrap">
              <div class="mix-cat-tabs" id="granolaCatTabs"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="mix-prod-list" id="granolaProdList"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="mix-sum-panel">
            <div class="granola-sum-head" id="granolaSumHead">Tu granola</div>
            <div class="mix-fill-wrap">
              <div class="mix-fill-label">
                <span>Llenado</span>
                <span id="granolaFillLbl">0 g</span>
              </div>
              <div class="mix-fill-bar"><div class="mix-fill-fill" id="granolaFillFill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
              <div class="mix-fill-hint" id="granolaFillHint">Agregar a tu carrito</div>
            </div>
            <div class="mix-ing-list" id="granolaIngList"></div>
            <div class="mix-sum-footer">
              <div class="mix-total-row"><span>Ingredientes</span><span id="granolaIngCount">0</span></div>
              <div class="mix-total-row main"><span>Total</span><span id="granolaTotal">$0</span></div>
              <button class="granola-add-btn" id="granolaAddBtn" disabled onclick="granolaAgregarAlCarrito()">Agregar a tu carrito</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cart-overlay" id="cartOverlay" onclick="closeCart()"></div>
<div class="cart-panel" id="cartPanel">
  <div class="cart-header"><h2>🛒 Tu pedido</h2><div class="cart-header-actions"><button class="cart-chat-btn" onclick="toggleChat()" title="Consultar" aria-label="Consultar">💬</button><button class="close-btn" onclick="closeCart()" aria-label="Cerrar"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="19" y1="12" x2="5" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 19 5 12 12 5"/></svg></button></div></div>
  <div class="cart-body" id="cartBody"></div>
  <div class="cart-footer hidden" id="cartFooter"></div>
</div>

<!-- CHATBOT -->
<button id="chat-fab" onclick="toggleChat()" title="Consultar">💬</button>
<button id="backToTop" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" title="Volver arriba">↑</button>
<button id="cart-fab" onclick="openCart()" title="Ver carrito">🛒<span class="cart-count" id="cartCount">0</span></button>
<div id="chat-box">
  <div id="chat-header">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt="">
    <span>Paladear · Asistente</span>
    <button id="chat-close" onclick="toggleChat()">×</button>
  </div>
  <div id="chat-msgs"></div>
  <div id="chat-input-row">
    <textarea id="chat-input" placeholder="Escribí tu consulta..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'&&!event.shiftKey){event.preventDefault();sendChat()}"></textarea>
    <button id="chat-send" onclick="sendChat()">➤</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
const RUBRO_MAP={'FRUTOS SECOS':{id:'frutos',n:'Frutos Secos',ic:'🥜'},'DESHIDRATADOS':{id:'deshidratados',n:'Deshidratados',ic:'🍇'},'SEMILLAS':{id:'semillas',n:'Semillas',ic:'🌻'},'ESPECIAS':{id:'especias',n:'Especias',ic:'🌿'},'INFUSIONES Y HIERBAS':{id:'infusiones',n:'Infusiones y Hierbas',ic:'🍵'},'CEREALES':{id:'cereales',n:'Cereales',ic:'🥣'},'GRANOS Y LEGUMBRES':{id:'granos',n:'Granos y Legumbres',ic:'🫘'},'HARINAS':{id:'harinas',n:'Harinas',ic:'🌾'},'PRODUCTOS SIN TACC':{id:'sintacc',n:'Sin TACC',ic:'🌱'},'DULCES, MIEL Y CHOCOLATES':{id:'dulces',n:'Dulces, Miel y Chocolates',ic:'🍯'},'AZUCAR, CACAO Y REPOSTERIA':{id:'reposteria',n:'Azúcar, Cacao y Repostería',ic:'🍫'},'MANTECAS Y PASTAS':{id:'mantecas',n:'Mantecas y Pastas',ic:'🧈'},'ACEITES Y VINAGRES':{id:'aceites',n:'Aceites y Vinagres',ic:'🫙'},'ACEITUNAS':{id:'aceitunas',n:'Aceitunas',ic:'🫒'},'ENCURTIDOS':{id:'encurtidos',n:'Encurtidos',ic:'🥒'},'TOMATE TRITURADO':{id:'tomate',n:'Tomate',ic:'🍅'},'SNACK':{id:'snack',n:'Snacks',ic:'🍿'},'SUPLEMENTOS':{id:'suplementos',n:'Suplementos',ic:'💊'},'LINEA GOURMET':{id:'gourmet',n:'Línea Gourmet',ic:'⭐'},'BEBIDAS':{id:'bebidas',n:'Bebidas',ic:'🥤'},'VINOS':{id:'vinos',n:'Vinos y Licores',ic:'🍷'},'PRODUCTOS DE FRIO':{id:'frio',n:'Productos de Frío',ic:'❄️'},'PRODUCTOS CONGELADOS':{id:'congelados',n:'Congelados',ic:'🧊'},'PALADEAR HOME':{id:'home',n:'Paladear Home',ic:'🏠'}};
let CATS=[],PRODS=[],searchTerm='',activeCatId=null,miniCartTimer=null;

/* ── PERSISTENCIA DEL CARRITO ── */
function _saveCart(){try{localStorage.setItem('paladear_cart',JSON.stringify(cart));}catch(e){}}
function _loadCart(){try{const s=localStorage.getItem('paladear_cart');return s?JSON.parse(s):[];}catch(e){return[];}}
let cart=_loadCart();
const APPS_SCRIPT_URL='https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwpRm16QpdpCNTtRwtmoZsNPesqA3Vfli2LEubvunNiV0lFTH-rKPLNaIpsm531F3c9/exec';
function fmt(n){return n.toLocaleString('es-AR')}
let _loaderHidden=false;
function hideLoader(){if(_loaderHidden)return;_loaderHidden=true;const o=document.getElementById('loadingOverlay');if(o){o.classList.add('hidden');setTimeout(()=>{if(o.parentNode)o.remove()},500)}}
// Timeout de seguridad: máximo 8s de espera
setTimeout(hideLoader,8000);
function calcWeight(opc,qty){let m=opc.match(/^(\d+)g$/i);if(m){let t=parseInt(m[1])*qty;return t>=1000?(t/1000)%1===0?(t/1000)+' kg':(t/1000).toFixed(1)+' kg':t+' g'}m=opc.match(/^(\d[\d,.]*)\s*kg$/i);if(m){let v=parseFloat(m[1].replace(',','.'))*qty;return v%1===0?v+' kg':v.toFixed(1)+' kg'}return opc+(qty>1?' x'+qty:'')}
function _norm(s){return(s||'').normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim()}
function _precio(s){const clean=(s||'').replace(/[^0-9,.]/g,'').replace(/\./g,'').replace(',','.');const n=parseFloat(clean);return isNaN(n)?0:Math.round(n)}
const _STOPWORDS=new Set(['DE','DEL','LA','EL','LOS','LAS','UN','UNA','Y','O','CON','EN','X','POR']);
function _fuzzyMatch(q,t){const qn=_norm(q).split(' ').filter(w=>w.length>1&&!_STOPWORDS.has(w));const tn=_norm(t);if(!qn.length)return false;return qn.some(w=>tn.includes(w))}
function _levenshtein(a,b){
  const m=a.length,n=b.length;
  const dp=Array.from({length:m+1},(_,i)=>Array.from({length:n+1},(_,j)=>i?j?0:i:j));
  for(let i=1;i<=m;i++)for(let j=1;j<=n;j++)
    dp[i][j]=a[i-1]===b[j-1]?dp[i-1][j-1]:1+Math.min(dp[i-1][j],dp[i][j-1],dp[i-1][j-1]);
  return dp[m][n];
}
function _wordScore(qw,tw){
  // coincidencia exacta de subcadena
  if(tw.includes(qw))return qw.length>=3?12:8;
  // si la palabra es muy corta no hacer fuzzy
  if(qw.length<3)return 0;
  // buscar si algún substring del texto de misma longitud es cercano
  const maxDist=qw.length<=4?1:qw.length<=7?2:3;
  for(let i=0;i<=tw.length-qw.length+maxDist;i++){
    const sub=tw.substr(i,qw.length);
    if(_levenshtein(qw,sub)<=maxDist)return 6-maxDist;
  }
  return 0;
}
function _matchScore(q,t){
  const qn=_norm(q).split(' ').filter(w=>w.length>1&&!_STOPWORDS.has(w));
  const tn=_norm(t);
  if(!qn.length)return 0;
  let score=0;
  qn.forEach(w=>{score+=_wordScore(w,tn);});
  const allMatch=qn.every(w=>_wordScore(w,tn)>0);
  if(allMatch&&qn.length>1)score+=15;
  return score;
}
function zoomImg(el){const src=el.dataset.src||'';if(!src)return;const old=document.getElementById('imgZoom');if(old)old.remove();const z=document.createElement('div');z.id='imgZoom';z.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===z||e.target.tagName==='IMG')z.remove()};z.innerHTML=`<button class="zoom-close" onclick="document.getElementById('imgZoom').remove()">×</button><img src="${src}" alt="">`;document.body.appendChild(z)}

/* ── CARRUSELES ── */
let _carRotationInterval=null;
const _carState={}; // {cid:{prods:[...],cursor:0}}

function _sortOpts(opts){
  // kg first: order by weight descending (1kg > 500g > 100g > und)
  function _optWeight(o){
    const mkg=o.match(/^(\d[\d,.]*)\s*kg$/i);if(mkg)return parseFloat(mkg[1].replace(',','.'))*1000;
    const mg=o.match(/^(\d+)\s*g$/i);if(mg)return parseInt(mg[1]);
    return -1; // unidades al final
  }
  return [...opts].sort((a,b)=>_optWeight(b)-_optWeight(a));
}
function _cardHTML(p){
  const opts=_sortOpts(Object.keys(p[7]));
  const precio=opts.length?p[7][opts[0]][0]:0;
  const hasSrc=p[6]&&p[6].startsWith('http');
  const cat=CATS.find(c=>c.id===p[1]);
  return `<div class="carousel-card" onclick="selectCat('${p[1]}',${p[0]})">
    <div class="carousel-card-img">${hasSrc?`<img src="${p[6]}" alt="${p[2]}" onerror="this.parentNode.innerHTML='🌿'" loading="lazy">`:`${cat?cat.ic:'🌿'}`}</div>
    <div class="carousel-card-body">
      <div class="carousel-card-name">${p[2]}</div>
      <div class="carousel-card-cat">${cat?cat.n:''}</div>
      <div class="carousel-card-price">$${fmt(precio)}</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function renderCarruseles(){
  // limpiar rotación previa si había
  if(_carRotationInterval){clearInterval(_carRotationInterval);_carRotationInterval=null;}
  for(const k in _carState)delete _carState[k];

  if(!PRODS.length){
    document.getElementById('desktopProdsArea').innerHTML='';
    document.getElementById('mobileProdsArea').innerHTML='';
    return;
  }
  const isMobile=window.innerWidth<768;
  let htmlDesktop='',htmlMobile='';

  CATS.forEach((cat,i)=>{
    const prods=PRODS.filter(p=>p[1]===cat.id);
    if(!prods.length)return;
    const cid='car'+i;

    // DESKTOP: guardar todos, mostrar solo 4 (barajados)
    const shuffled=[...prods].sort(()=>Math.random()-.5);
    _carState[cid]={prods:shuffled,cursor:0};
    const visibles=shuffled.slice(0,4);
    htmlDesktop+=`<div class="carousel-section">
      <div class="carousel-title">${cat.n}</div>
      <div class="carousel-wrap">
        <div class="carousel-track" id="${cid}">${visibles.map(_cardHTML).join('')}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

    // MOBILE: todos los productos del rubro en el track scrolleable
    const cidM='carM'+i;
    htmlMobile+=`<div class="carousel-section">
      <div class="carousel-title">${cat.n}</div>
      <div class="carousel-wrap">
        <div class="carousel-track" id="${cidM}">${prods.map(_cardHTML).join('')}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });

  document.getElementById('desktopProdsArea').innerHTML=htmlDesktop||'<div></div>';
  document.getElementById('mobileProdsArea').innerHTML=htmlMobile||'<div></div>';
  document.getElementById('mobileProdsArea').classList.remove('hidden');

  // Auto-rotación en desktop cada 12s
  if(!isMobile){_carRotationInterval=setInterval(rotarCarruseles,12000);}
}

function rotarCarruseles(){
  // si el usuario navegó a una categoría, los carruseles ya no están
  for(const cid in _carState){
    const track=document.getElementById(cid);
    if(!track)continue;
    const st=_carState[cid];
    if(st.prods.length<=4)continue; // no rotar si hay 4 o menos
    st.cursor=(st.cursor+4)%st.prods.length;
    // tomar 4 a partir del cursor (con wrap)
    const nuevos=[];
    for(let k=0;k<4;k++)nuevos.push(st.prods[(st.cursor+k)%st.prods.length]);
    // fade out → cambiar → fade in
    track.style.transition='opacity .4s ease';
    track.style.opacity='0';
    setTimeout(()=>{
      track.innerHTML=nuevos.map(_cardHTML).join('');
      track.style.opacity='1';
    },400);
  }
}

/* ── RENDER CATEGORÍAS ── */
function renderCatsUI(){
  const mg=document.getElementById('catsMobileGrid');
  mg.innerHTML=CATS.map((c,i)=>`<button class="cat-mobile-btn${activeCatId===c.id?' active':''}" style="background:var(--cat${i%4})" onclick="selectCat('${c.id}')"><div class="nm">${c.n}</div></button>`).join('');
  const sl=document.getElementById('catsSidebarList');
  sl.innerHTML=CATS.map((c,i)=>`<button class="cat-list-btn${activeCatId===c.id?' active':''}" style="background:var(--cat${i%4})" onclick="selectCat('${c.id}')"><div class="nm">${c.n}</div></button>`).join('');
}

/* ── SELECCIONAR CATEGORÍA ── */
function selectCat(catId,productId){
  if(_carRotationInterval){clearInterval(_carRotationInterval);_carRotationInterval=null;}
  activeCatId=catId;
  renderCatsUI();
  const cat=CATS.find(c=>c.id===catId);
  const prods=PRODS.filter(p=>p[1]===catId);
  const isMobile=window.innerWidth<768;
  const backBtn=`<button class="back-btn" onclick="volverInicio()">← Volver al inicio</button>`;
  const prefix=isMobile?'mb':'dt';
  const html=backBtn+renderProdsHTML(cat,prods,prefix);
  const area=isMobile?document.getElementById('mobileProdsArea'):document.getElementById('desktopProdsArea');
  if(isMobile)area.classList.remove('hidden');
  area.innerHTML=html;
  history.pushState({view:'cat',catId,productId},'');
  if(productId!=null){
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const card=document.getElementById(prefix+'_'+productId);
      if(card){
        card.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});
        card.classList.add('highlight-card');
        setTimeout(()=>card.classList.remove('highlight-card'),2200);
      }else{
        area.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
      }
    },60);
  }else{
    area.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
  }
}

function volverInicio(){
  activeCatId=null;
  renderCatsUI();
  renderCarruseles();
}

function renderProdsHTML(cat,prods,prefix){
  let h=`<h2 style="font-size:22px;color:var(--azul-dark);margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:700">${cat.ic} ${cat.n}</h2>`;
  if(!prods.length)return h+'<div style="text-align:center;padding:48px 0;color:var(--muted-fg);font-size:17px">No se encontraron productos 🔍</div>';
  h+='<div class="prod-grid">';
  prods.forEach(p=>{h+=renderCard(p,prefix)});
  h+='</div>';
  return h;
}

const TRASH_SVG='<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6"/><path d="M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h4a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2"/></svg>';
const EDIT_SVG='<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg>';
function _acumLabel(p){
  const cartAcum=cart.filter(i=>i.pid===p[0]);
  if(!cartAcum.length)return'';
  if(p[4]==='kg'){
    // nuevo modelo: item unificado con totalG
    const totalG=cartAcum.reduce((a,i)=>a+(i.totalG||0),0);
    return _gLabel(totalG);
  } else {
    return cartAcum.reduce((a,i)=>a+(i.c||0),0)+' und';
  }
}
function renderCard(p,prefix){
  const opts=_sortOpts(Object.keys(p[7]));if(!opts.length)return'';
  const id=prefix+'_'+p[0];
  const hasSrc=p[6]&&p[6].startsWith('http');
  const infoText=p[8]||'';
  const sabores=p[9]||null;
  const acumLbl=_acumLabel(p);
  let h=`<div class="pcard" id="${id}">`;
  h+=`<div class="pcard-img" onclick="zoomImg(this)" data-src="${hasSrc?p[6]:''}">${hasSrc?`<img src="${p[6]}" alt="${p[2]}" onerror="this.parentNode.innerHTML='🌿'" loading="lazy">`:`🌿`}</div>`;
  h+=`<div class="pcard-body">`;
  h+=`<div class="pcard-head"><div class="pcard-name">${p[2]}</div>`;
  if(infoText)h+=`<button class="info-btn" onclick="showInfo(${p[0]})" title="Ver información">ℹ️</button>`;
  h+=`</div>`;
  h+=`<div class="pcard-brand">${p[3]}</div>`;
  h+='<div class="opt-btns">';
  opts.forEach((o,i)=>{h+=`<button class="opt-btn${i===0?' active':''}" onclick="selOpt('${id}','${o.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}',${p[7][o][0]},${p[7][o][1]})">${o}</button>`});
  h+='</div>';
  if(sabores&&sabores.length){
    h+=`<div class="sabor-row"><label class="sabor-label" for="${id}_sab">Sabor:</label><select class="sabor-select" id="${id}_sab" onchange="selSabor('${id}',this.value)">`;
    sabores.forEach(s=>{h+=`<option value="${s.replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}">${s}</option>`});
    h+='</select></div>';
  }
  h+=`<div class="prices"><div><span class="price-label">Minorista</span><div class="price-min">$${fmt(p[7][opts[0]][0])}</div></div><div><span class="price-label">Desc. Volumen</span><div class="price-may">$${fmt(p[7][opts[0]][1])}</div></div></div>`;
  const acumInfo=acumLbl?`<span class="acum-badge">🛒 ${acumLbl}</span>`:'';
  h+=`<div class="qty-row"><button class="qty-btn" onclick="chgQty('${id}',-1)">−</button><span class="qty-val" id="${id}_q">1</span><button class="qty-btn" onclick="chgQty('${id}',1)">+</button>${acumInfo}</div>`;
  h+=`<button class="add-btn" id="${id}_ab" onclick="addToCart(${p[0]},'${id}')">🛒 Agregar al pedido</button>`;
  // Trash + edit buttons — only shown when item is in cart
  const cartItem=cart.find(i=>i.pid===p[0]);
  if(cartItem){
    h+=`<div class="card-cart-actions">
      <button class="card-del-btn" onclick="cardDelProduct(${p[0]})" title="Quitar del carrito">${TRASH_SVG}</button>
      <button class="card-edit-btn" onclick="openCart()" title="Editar en carrito">${EDIT_SVG} Ver en carrito</button>
    </div>`;
  }
  h+=`</div></div>`;
  return h;
}

function cardDelProduct(pid){
  cart=cart.filter(i=>i.pid!==pid);
  updateCartCount();
  _reRenderCard(pid);
}
